legacy.descriptionHtml:
Eighteenth

A Monday mix to give you the blues.

Monday Music Mix: 18

Tracklist:

  1. Pinback - Boo
  2. Sparrow House - When I Am Gone
  3. Noah And The Whale - Second Lover
  4. The Get Up Kids - No Love
  5. Blur - No Distance Left To Run
  6. Bright Eyes - It’s Cool, We Can Still Be Friends
  7. Coldplay - Warning Sign
  8. Elliott Smith - I Didn’t Understand
  9. Johnny Cash - Hurt
  10. The Mountain Goats - No Children
  11. dios Malos - Asshole
  12. Kid Cudi - Erase Me
  13. Glee Cast - Songbird (originally by Fleetwood Mac)
  14. Guillemots - Blue Would Still Be Blue

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album (zip format)
